creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Also, the 'login' CGI script fails:

> Software error:
> Can't locate TWiki/Users/TWikiUserMapping.pm in @INC (you may need to install the TWiki::Users::TWikiUserMapping module) (@INC contains: /usr/local/share/twiki/core/lib . /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/mach/5.30 /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.30/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.30) at (eval 37) line 1.
> For help, please send mail to this site's webmaster, giving this error message and the time and date of the error.
